Richard Madden

Fitness GYM

A Fitness Trainer helps individuals improve their health and physical performance through customized workout routines, goal setting, and motivation. They guide clients in proper exercise techniques, monitor progress, and promote a balanced lifestyle through fitness and wellness coaching.

Our Services

Fitness Assessment & Goal Setting

Start with initial evaluations to set achievable fitness goals, allowing trainers to design appropriate exercise programs and monitor progress over time.

Nutrition & Diet Consultation

Receive personalized meal planning and wellness coaching from nutrition experts who provide evidence-based advice to support your fitness objectives and promote a balance...

Strength & Weight Training

Access a range of free weights, machines, and resistance training equipment designed to help build muscle strength, enhance endurance, and improve overall body compositio...

Group Fitness Classes

Participate in a variety of group classes such as Zumba, yoga, HIIT, and spinning.
